economic_notes: Investments in forestry operations (Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry LP), property management (Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society), real property in Chilliwack River Valley (Centre Creek LP), environmental monitoring (Seven Generations Environmental Services Ltd.), and Ts'elxweyeqx Tribe Limited Partnership managing forestry activities.
notes: 8 entities accounted for on modified equity basis (GBEs and partnerships). CMHC subsidy of $40,999 included in revenue. Prior year included $491,663 from CFB lands claim settlement (one-time item in 2021, not 2022). Government business partnerships use December 31 year-end financial statements. Long-term debt increased due to new borrowing of $109,776 while repayments were $47,665. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($468,692) + CMHC ($40,999) + Sto:lo Service Agency Society ($6,404) = $516,095 but Ottawa Trust Revenue ($178) also government so $510,616 used as ISC+CMHC+Sto:lo only; osr calculated as total revenue minus government transfers.
